message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title SD_getListFromExternalModule(fileName)

participant "store: SnsUserStore" as store
interface "«interface»\n:LoadSnsUsersFromExternalSource" as interface
participant ":List<SnsUserDTO>" as list

activate store
autonumber
  start
  -> store : getListFromExternalModule(fileName)
  activate store
    self : className = getClassName(fileName)
    -> interface : dtoList = readFileFromExternalSource(fileName)
    activate interface
      create list
    deactivate interface
    note right of interface: multiple interactions in the externalSource to extract a list of SnsUserDTO
    return dtoList
  deactivate store
@endnote
@endautonumber
deactivate store

@enduml
```
